/usr/bin/ar qc libmini_muduo.a CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/base/Logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/base/Timestamp.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/Acceptor.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/Buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/Channel.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/EPollPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/EventLoop.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/EventLoopThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/EventLoopThreadPool.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/InetAddress.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/Poller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/SocketsOps.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/Socket.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/TcpConnection.cc.o CMakeFiles/mini_muduo.dir/src/net/TcpServer.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmini_muduo.a
